creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Thu Mar 20 17:44:44 2014
New Revision: 348709
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/348709
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r348709/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/187425 (based on)
  Submitted by:	Takefu <takefu@airport.fm>
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/japanese/gawk/Makefile
  head/japanese/gawk/pkg-plist

Modified: head/japanese/gawk/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/japanese/gawk/Makefile	Thu Mar 20 15:51:11 2014	(r348708)
+++ head/japanese/gawk/Makefile	Thu Mar 20 17:44:44 2014	(r348709)
@@ -14,22 +14,25 @@ PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
 MAINTAINER=	ota@j.email.ne.jp
 COMMENT=	GNU awk + multi-byte extension
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-bitops --enable-non-decimal-data
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 INFO=		gawk
 
-MAN1=		gawk.1 igawk.1
-
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/${PKGBASE}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
+post-configure:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -E \
+	'/(DEFPATH|sed )/!s,(bin|data|lib|info|man|libexec)dir\),DESTDIR\)$$\(&,g' \
+		${WRKSRC}/Makefile ${WRKSRC}/doc/Makefile ${WRKSRC}/awklib/Makefile
+
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/OREADME.MB ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README.MB ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/gawk.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/igawk.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} OREADME.MB README.MB ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/japanese/gawk/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/japanese/gawk/pkg-plist	Thu Mar 20 15:51:11 2014	(r348708)
+++ head/japanese/gawk/pkg-plist	Thu Mar 20 17:44:44 2014	(r348709)
@@ -2,6 +2,8 @@ bin/gawk
 bin/igawk
 libexec/awk/grcat
 libexec/awk/pwcat
+man/man1/gawk.1.gz
+man/man1/igawk.1.gz
 share/awk/assert.awk
 share/awk/ctime.awk
 share/awk/ftrans.awk
@@ -14,8 +16,8 @@ share/awk/nextfile.awk
 share/awk/ord.awk
 share/awk/passwd.awk
 share/awk/round.awk
-%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/ja-gawk/OREADME.MB
-%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/ja-gawk/README.MB
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/ja-gawk
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/OREADME.MB
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.MB
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
 @dirrm share/awk
 @dirrm libexec/awk
